name: salary-management
description: HR salary management — monorepo root scripts

scripts.dev: concurrently --names API,WEB --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:web: echo "No web tests yet — add in Story G1"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.lint:api: uv run --directory apps/api ruff check app/ tests/
scripts.lint:web: npm run lint --prefix apps/web && npm run format:check --prefix apps/web
scripts.format: npm run format:api && npm run format:web
scripts.format:api: uv run --directory apps/api ruff format app/ tests/
